_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Why Computers Are Useful
subtitle: Computers help people in daily life!
overview: Students learn how computers are useful in real life. They observe how computers help in shops, hospitals, schools, banks, homes, and entertainment. Students understand that computers make work faster, easier, and smarter.

images._note: Add real classroom photos, hospital computer systems, billing counters, online learning, and students observing software.

gallery.caption: Computers help shopkeepers make bills quickly
Hospitals use computers for patient records
Students use computers for learning and research
Computers help us watch videos and learn new things
Banks use computers to manage money safely
Computers help students attend online classes
Railway stations use computers for ticket booking

keyTopics: Computers are used in shops for billing
Hospitals use computers to store patient information
Students use computers for study and online classes
Banks use computers to keep records safely
People watch movies, cartoons, and videos on computers
Computers help communicate using email and video calls
Computers are useful in offices, railways, airports, and homes

activity.title: Find Computers Around Us
steps: Teacher shows pictures of places using computers
Students identify where computers are used
Students share examples from their home or neighborhood
Challenge: Draw one real-life use of computers

options: They help people work faster and easier
quiz.explanation: Computers help people finish work quickly and accurately.
Shops use computers to create bills and keep records.
Hospitals use computers to save medical records and reports.
Computers help students learn through videos, classes, and research.
Computers are used in many places including banks, hospitals, and schools.

quiz.q: What can we watch on computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers are useful for entertainment and learning videos.
Banks use computers to safely manage account information.

quiz.q: Which device helps us attend online classes?
quiz.explanation: Students use computers or laptops for online learning.
Computers allow people to connect through video calls and messages.

quiz.q: Computers are useful in railway stations for:
quiz.explanation: Railway stations use computers for booking and checking tickets.

quiz.q: True or False: Computers can only be used for games.
quiz.explanation: Computers are used for learning, hospitals, banking, shopping, communication, and much more.

quiz.q: Which of these is NOT a use of computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers help manage information but do not directly grow trees.

quiz.q: What do computers help us save?
quiz.explanation: Computers help people complete tasks faster and save time.

quiz.q: What can children learn using computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers support many types of learning activities.

quiz.q: What should we remember while using computers?
quiz.explanation: Computers are valuable devices and should be used safely.
